preview: Your birthday shout-out is ready to review!

messages.body: Hey Mia! Can you do a birthday shout-out for my sister Anya?
Absolutely — send me her name, a few inside jokes, and whether you want it upbeat or sentimental.
Upbeat please! She just finished her first half marathon. Name is Anya, loves chai and early morning runs.
Love it. I'll record tonight and send a preview tomorrow morning.
Your birthday shout-out is ready to review! Let me know if you want any tweaks before I finalize.

preview: Episode 142 drops Friday — want early access?

messages.body: Thanks for subscribing! You'll get member-only threads like this one.
Loved last week's episode on edge runtimes. Any plans to cover local-first apps?
Episode 142 drops Friday — want early access? I can send the private link here.

preview: Behind-the-scenes from the Arctic shoot is live for members.

messages.body: Welcome to the member channel — we post field updates here before anywhere else.
Behind-the-scenes from the Arctic shoot is live for members. The drone footage is wild.

preview: Your payout settings were updated successfully.

messages.body: Hi Dhanuka — thanks for reaching out. How can we help today?
I updated my bank details for creator payouts. Can you confirm everything looks good?
Your payout settings were updated successfully. The next transfer will use the new account.

preview: Sounds good — see you at the demo.

messages.body: Are we still on for the livefeed demo Thursday?
Yes! I'll share the staging link in the morning.
Sounds good — see you at the demo.
